SEARCH
Package fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.application.meteo

Class WindMessageFactory

java.lang.Object
fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.application.meteo.WindMessageFactory
public final class WindMessageFactory extends Object
Factory building wind MessageI instances populated with the properties expected by MeteoFilters.

Per the soutenance review (1.10), wind message construction must not be scattered as inline literal-property assignments. Every wind message used by the system goes through this factory.

Author:
Bogdan Styn, Setbel Mélissa

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static MessageI
    build(String stationId, WindDataI wind)
    Build a wind message.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

  • Method Details

    • build

      public static MessageI build(String stationId, WindDataI wind)
      Build a wind message.

      Properties set:

      • MeteoProperties.TYPE = MeteoProperties.TYPE_WIND
      • MeteoProperties.PAYLOAD = the WindDataI payload (so value filters can reach it)
      • MeteoProperties.STATION_ID = stationId
      • MeteoProperties.FORCE = string form of WindDataI.force()
      • MeteoProperties.X = string form of WindDataI.xComponent()
      • MeteoProperties.Y = string form of WindDataI.yComponent()
      Parameters:
      stationId - identifier of the publishing WeatherStation.
      wind - wind observation (must not be null).
      Returns:
      a fully populated MessageI.

Bogdan Styn, Setbel Mélissa — Sorbonne Université, 2026
